critical.title: Managed configuration and session replay changed on main

main:codex-rs/core/src/session/config_lock.rs — Session config-lock export/replay persists resolved model, permission/app/collaboration/environment fields and agent concurrency/depth.

evidenceBindings.observation: ConfigRequirements now binds approval reviewer, sandbox mode, permission profile, MCP requirements, managed hooks, and composite requirement-source provenance.

critical.localContractImpact: Extend and requalify the CUE/Pydantic controller contract for requirement provenance, replay identity, and effective permission state.

critical.title: Alpha unified-exec permission and process semantics changed
critical.summary: Alpha changes write_stdin polling/interaction emission, permission-profile environment injection, sandbox retries, and process management.
evidence: latest-alpha-cli:codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec/write_stdin.rs — Empty stdin is treated as a background poll and terminal interaction emission now depends on live process state; non-empty stdin remains visible after completion.

latest-alpha-cli:codex-rs/core/src/unified_exec/process_manager.rs — Unified exec injects permission-profile state, distinguishes sandbox retry executor processes, and changes process lifecycle management.
latest-alpha-cli:codex-rs/prompts/src/permissions_instructions.rs — Permission instructions project approval reviewer, sandbox mode, permission profile, and request-permission capability.

evidenceBindings.observation: Empty stdin is treated as a background poll and terminal interaction emission now depends on live process state; non-empty stdin remains visible after completion.

Permission instructions project approval reviewer, sandbox mode, permission profile, and request-permission capability.

claims.text: Alpha changes write_stdin polling/interaction emission, permission-profile environment injection, sandbox retries, and process management.
